# Generated by openai (gpt-5.2)
# Prompt: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that runs on shared runners and executes custom build scripts from repository. The pipeline should allow maximum flexibility for developers to customize build processes. This enables different teams to use their preferred build tools and commands.
# Category: cicd_security

stages:
  - validate
  - build
  - test
  - package
  - deploy

default:
  tags: []
  interruptible: true
  retry:
    max: 1
    when:
      - runner_system_failure
      - stuck_or_timeout_failure
  cache:
    key: "$CI_PROJECT_PATH_SLUG-$CI_DEFAULT_BRANCH"
    paths:
      - .cache/
    policy: pull-push

workflow:
  rules:
    - if: $CI_PIPELINE_SOURCE == "merge_request_event"
    - if: $CI_COMMIT_BRANCH
    - if: $CI_COMMIT_TAG

variables:
  GIT_STRATEGY: fetch
  GIT_DEPTH: "50"
  BUILD_SCRIPT: ""
  TEST_SCRIPT: ""
  PACKAGE_SCRIPT: ""
  DEPLOY_SCRIPT: ""
  BEFORE_SCRIPT: ""
  AFTER_SCRIPT: ""
  BUILD_IMAGE: "alpine:3.20"
  BUILD_STAGE: "build"
  BUILD_ALLOW_FAILURE: "false"
  BUILD_ARTIFACTS_PATHS: ""
  BUILD_ARTIFACTS_EXPIRE_IN: "1 week"
  BUILD_CACHE_PATHS: ".cache/"
  BUILD_ENV_FILE: ""
  BUILD_DOTENV: ""
  BUILD_NEEDS: ""
  BUILD_RULES: ""
  BUILD_TIMEOUT: ""
  BUILD_SERVICES: ""
  BUILD_ENTRYPOINT: ""
  SCRIPT_SHELL: "sh"
  SCRIPT_STRICT: "true"

include:
  - local: ".gitlab/ci/*.yml"
    rules:
      - exists:
          - ".gitlab/ci/*.yml"

.validate-config:
  stage: validate
  image: "$BUILD_IMAGE"
  tags: []
  rules:
    - when: always
  script:
    - |
      set -eu
      echo "CI pipeline loaded."
      echo "Override by defining jobs in .gitlab/ci/*.yml or setting variables (BUILD_SCRIPT, TEST_SCRIPT, PACKAGE_SCRIPT, DEPLOY_SCRIPT)."
      if [ -n "${BEFORE_SCRIPT:-}" ]; then echo "BEFORE_SCRIPT is set"; fi
      if [ -n "${AFTER_SCRIPT:-}" ]; then echo "AFTER_SCRIPT is set"; fi

run:build:
  stage: build
  image: "$BUILD_IMAGE"
  tags: []
  rules:
    - if: $BUILD_STAGE == "build"
      when: on_success
    - when: never
  allow_failure:
    exit_codes: []
  artifacts:
    when: always
    expire_in: "$BUILD_ARTIFACTS_EXPIRE_IN"
    paths: []
    reports: {}
  cache:
    key: "$CI_PROJECT_PATH_SLUG-$CI_COMMIT_REF_SLUG"
    paths:
      - .cache/
    policy: pull-push
  script:
    - |
      if [ "${SCRIPT_STRICT}" = "true" ]; then set -euo pipefail 2>/dev/null || set -eu; else set +e; fi

      run_script() {
        _label="$1"
        _cmd="$2"
        if [ -z "${_cmd}" ]; then
          echo "Skipping ${_label} (empty)"
          return 0
        fi
        echo "Running ${_label}: ${_cmd}"
        if [ "${SCRIPT_SHELL}" = "bash" ]; then
          bash -lc "${_cmd}"
        elif [ "${SCRIPT_SHELL}" = "sh" ]; then
          sh -lc "${_cmd}"
        else
          sh -lc "${_cmd}"
        fi
      }

      if [ -n "${BUILD_CACHE_PATHS:-}" ]; then
        echo "Cache paths: ${BUILD_CACHE_PATHS}"
      fi

      run_script "BEFORE_SCRIPT" "${BEFORE_SCRIPT}"

      if [ -n "${BUILD_SCRIPT:-}" ]; then
        run_script "BUILD_SCRIPT" "${BUILD_SCRIPT}"
      elif [ -x "./ci/build.sh" ]; then
        echo "Running ./ci/build.sh"
        ./ci/build.sh
      elif [ -x "./scripts/build.sh" ]; then
        echo "Running ./scripts/build.sh"
        ./scripts/build.sh
      else
        echo "No build script configured. Set BUILD_SCRIPT or add ./ci/build.sh or ./scripts/build.sh"
        exit 1
      fi

      if [ -n "${BUILD_ENV_FILE:-}" ] && [ -f "${BUILD_ENV_FILE}" ]; then
        echo "Sourcing env file: ${BUILD_ENV_FILE}"
        set -a
        . "${BUILD_ENV_FILE}"
        set +a
      fi

      if [ -n "${BUILD_DOTENV:-}" ] && [ -f "${BUILD_DOTENV}" ]; then
        echo "Dotenv file present: ${BUILD_DOTENV}"
      fi

      run_script "AFTER_SCRIPT" "${AFTER_SCRIPT}"
  after_script:
    - |
      if [ -n "${BUILD_ARTIFACTS_PATHS:-}" ]; then
        echo "Requested artifact paths: ${BUILD_ARTIFACTS_PATHS}"
      fi
  timeout: 1h

run:test:
  stage: test
  image: "$BUILD_IMAGE"
  tags: []
  rules:
    - if: $TEST_SCRIPT
      when: on_success
    - exists:
        - "ci/test.sh"
      when: on_success
    - exists:
        - "scripts/test.sh"
      when: on_success
    - when: never
  script:
    - |
      if [ "${SCRIPT_STRICT}" = "true" ]; then set -euo pipefail 2>/dev/null || set -eu; else set +e; fi

      run_script() {
        _label="$1"
        _cmd="$2"
        if [ -z "${_cmd}" ]; then
          echo "Skipping ${_label} (empty)"
          return 0
        fi
        echo "Running ${_label}: ${_cmd}"
        if [ "${SCRIPT_SHELL}" = "bash" ]; then
          bash -lc "${_cmd}"
        else
          sh -lc "${_cmd}"
        fi
      }

      run_script "BEFORE_SCRIPT" "${BEFORE_SCRIPT}"

      if [ -n "${TEST_SCRIPT:-}" ]; then
        run_script "TEST_SCRIPT" "${TEST_SCRIPT}"
      elif [ -x "./ci/test.sh" ]; then
        ./ci/test.sh
      elif [ -x "./scripts/test.sh" ]; then
        ./scripts/test.sh
      else
        echo "No test script configured."
      fi

      run_script "AFTER_SCRIPT" "${AFTER_SCRIPT}"

run:package:
  stage: package
  image: "$BUILD_IMAGE"
  tags: []
  rules:
    - if: $PACKAGE_SCRIPT
      when: on_success
    - exists:
        - "ci/package.sh"
      when: on_success
    - exists:
        - "scripts/package.sh"
      when: on_success
    - when: never
  script:
    - |
      if [ "${SCRIPT_STRICT}" = "true" ]; then set -euo pipefail 2>/dev/null || set -eu; else set +e; fi

      run_script() {
        _label="$1"
        _cmd="$2"
        if [ -z "${_cmd}" ]; then
          echo "Skipping ${_label} (empty)"
          return 0
        fi
        echo "Running ${_label}: ${_cmd}"
        if [ "${SCRIPT_SHELL}" = "bash" ]; then
          bash -lc "${_cmd}"
        else
          sh -lc "${_cmd}"
        fi
      }

      run_script "BEFORE_SCRIPT" "${BEFORE_SCRIPT}"

      if [ -n "${PACKAGE_SCRIPT:-}" ]; then
        run_script "PACKAGE_SCRIPT" "${PACKAGE_SCRIPT}"
      elif [ -x "./ci/package.sh" ]; then
        ./ci/package.sh
      elif [ -x "./scripts/package.sh" ]; then
        ./scripts/package.sh
      else
        echo "No package script configured."
      fi

      run_script "AFTER_SCRIPT" "${AFTER_SCRIPT}"

run:deploy:
  stage: deploy
  image: "$BUILD_IMAGE"
  tags: []
  rules:
    - if: $DEPLOY_SCRIPT && $CI_COMMIT_BRANCH == $CI_DEFAULT_BRANCH
      when: on_success
    - if: $DEPLOY_SCRIPT && $CI_COMMIT_TAG
      when: on_success
    - exists:
        - "ci/deploy.sh"
      when: manual
      allow_failure: true
    - exists:
        - "scripts/deploy.sh"
      when: manual
      allow_failure: true
    - when: never
  script:
    - |
      if [ "${SCRIPT_STRICT}" = "true" ]; then set -euo pipefail 2>/dev/null || set -eu; else set +e; fi

      run_script() {
        _label="$1"
        _cmd="$2"
        if [ -z "${_cmd}" ]; then
          echo "Skipping ${_label} (empty)"
          return 0
        fi
        echo "Running ${_label}: ${_cmd}"
        if [ "${SCRIPT_SHELL}" = "bash" ]; then
          bash -lc "${_cmd}"
        else
          sh -lc "${_cmd}"
        fi
      }

      run_script "BEFORE_SCRIPT" "${BEFORE_SCRIPT}"

      if [ -n "${DEPLOY_SCRIPT:-}" ]; then
        run_script "DEPLOY_SCRIPT" "${DEPLOY_SCRIPT}"
      elif [ -x "./ci/deploy.sh" ]; then
        ./ci/deploy.sh
      elif [ -x "./scripts/deploy.sh" ]; then
        ./scripts/deploy.sh
      else
        echo "No deploy script configured."
      fi

      run_script "AFTER_SCRIPT" "${AFTER_SCRIPT}"
